# Worktugal

> AI jobs board for remote professionals in Europe. Curated roles from leading AI companies.

## What this site does
- Browse 500+ AI and tech jobs open to candidates in Europe
- Post a job listing for EUR 49 — reach qualified AI talent in the European ecosystem
- Free Portugal compliance diagnostic for remote workers

## Key pages
- /jobs — AI jobs board, updated daily from ATS feeds (Anthropic, Stripe, Databricks, GitLab, Mistral AI, xAI, and more)
- /jobs/post — Self-serve job posting (EUR 49, no subscription)
- /diagnostic — Free Portugal compliance risk check (13 questions, 2 minutes)
- /blog — Compliance and remote work guides (blog.worktugal.com)

## Data sources
Jobs aggregated from public ATS feeds: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, and direct company APIs.

## Contact
hello@worktugal.com
